notes: Phase 5 has started with the reusable public site shell: root layout, navigation, responsive main container, footer, skip link, and dark baseline theme.
The professional CI lane now runs scripts/check_phase_site_shell.py and requires Phase 5 shell evidence artifacts.
Phase 5 remains open until the owner workstation proves pnpm check, pnpm build, Vite dev readiness, desktop/mobile route smoke for /, and professional CI.
